store_subtitle: Spend your credits on buffs and rewards
inventory_subtitle: Your owned items and active buffs
staking_subtitle: Stake credits for long-term passive gains
not_enough_credits: Not enough credits to purchase this item.

staking_section.title: System Core
staking_section.subtitle: Stake Credits for passive boosts or infuse Buffs for permanent upgrades.
staking_section.daily_sync_desc: A permanent XP boost that grows with your daily quest completion streak.
staking_section.infinite_bonus_note: This bonus stacks infinitely and applies on top of all other multipliers. There is no upper limit.
staking_section.staking_limit_note: Your staking limit increases as you level up.
staking_section.unlock_msg: Reach Level {{level}} to unlock Credit Staking.
staking_section.buff_infusion_desc: Permanently consume buffs from your inventory to gain stacking passive bonuses.
staking_section.no_buffs_inventory: No buffs in inventory to stake.
staking_section.how_it_works_desc: Each infused buff provides a permanent, exponentially stacking bonus (2x, 4x, 8x...). The number of times you can infuse a single type of buff increases with your overall level.
